arms_mandatory_baselines: committed axiom corpora: lexical-wn31 typed-edge axioms + onto-sumo logical (non-metadata) axioms + kernel-v0/molecules-v0 axiom sidecars (pinned static corpus)

dependent_vars.definition: axioms whose canonical form needs AND-under-operator under the pinned classifier (R1: or-node not under not; R2: and-node under not; instrument docstring cites the design-doc rules)
dependent_vars.name: n_need_and_under_operator

dependent_vars.definition: of those, expressible in the kot-axiom/1 closed sidecar inventory (only the all-atom not-and disjointness shape maps to disjointWith)
dependent_vars.name: n_need_and_sidecar_expressible

dependent_vars.definition: axiom universe: lexical-wn31 typed edges (single-atom by construction, zero-demand) + kernel-v0/molecules-v0 axiom sidecars (currently 0, counted) + onto-sumo non-metadata axioms (the operator-rich demand sample); by-source breakdown reported in run metrics
dependent_vars.name: n_axioms

n_planned.g4_leg_note: the authored ~20-axiom working set (d-ax/d-axn) does not exist at freeze time; HS6 over that set re-registers under a successor experiment id when authored, preserving the P1 hard ordering G4 before G6 for that leg (correction c-g6-1)
n_planned.regression_note: re-run as regression at 10^4-10^5 records during bulk authoring (P1 §4b HS2-HS8 envelope row)

endpoints.test: deterministic static count vs the pre-registered 20% bound (NF5); count-based fork criterion, carries no statistical test (P1 common rules)
deterministic: every AND-under-operator axiom is sidecar-expressible

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HS2–HS8 (verbatim): Measured range: R0 — no host model. Reasonable extrapolation envelope: Model-scale-free (properties of the kernel formalism); the relevant axis is KERNEL size: verdicts on 54–10³ records re-checked at 10⁴–10⁵ during bulk authoring (G6/G7 re-run as regression). Literature anchor + licensing assumption: Formal-fragment properties don't vary with observer scale; only corpus composition shifts them.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §4 HS6 statement + kill (verbatim): '(HS6) <20% of the working axiom set needs AND-under-operator and all such are sidecar-expressible ⇒ the native fragment stays ∃-conjunctive-only.' Kill (P1 §8): '≥20% need + not sidecar-expressible ⇒ extend grammar.' Kill criteria are the numeric bounds from NF5, verbatim.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

title: G6 — AND-under-operator static count over the committed axiom corpora (HS6 / NF5; deterministic count, no test; the authored G4-set leg re-runs under a successor experiment id once d-ax exists — correction c-g6-1)
